eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Gunnison; Montrose, CO; at 7:39 AM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 11:39 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: PREPARE TO EVACUATE: Montrose County Sheriff’s Office has issued a Pre-Evacuation notice for properties in evacuation zone 34, which includes the area south of the P77 Road/Cimarron Road intersection and properties on P77 Road one mile north of the intersection. View the Evacuation Map at OurayCountyCO.gov You should PREPARE for Future Evacuations. An evacuation order could come at any time.
